title: Customers API
description: The Customers API enables merchants to manage customer information including personal details, addresses, contact information, and associated payment cards. This API provides functionality to create customer profiles and retrieve detailed customer information for enhanced customer relationship management.

apis.heading: Add Customer Details
apis.description: Creates a new customer profile with personal information, addresses, contact details, and associated payment cards. Use this API to register new customers and store their comprehensive information for future transactions and customer management.

reqParams.name: firstName
reqParams.description: Customer's first name.

reqParams.name: middleName
reqParams.description: Customer's middle name.

reqParams.name: lastName
reqParams.description: Customer's surname or last name.

reqParams.name: birthDate
reqParams.description: Customer's date of birth in YYYY/MM/DD format.

reqParams.name: countryCode
reqParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code representing the customer's country, in uppercase.

reqParams.name: gender
reqParams.description: Customer's gender.

reqParams.name: address
reqParams.description: Array of customer addresses for different purposes (shipping, billing, etc.).

reqParams.name: careOf
reqParams.description: Care of information for the address.

reqParams.name: addressLine1
reqParams.description: First line of the customer's address.

reqParams.name: addressLine2
reqParams.description: Second line of the customer's address.

reqParams.name: addressLine3
reqParams.description: Third line of the customer's address.

reqParams.name: city
reqParams.description: City of the customer's address.

reqParams.name: countryCode
reqParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code for the address, in uppercase.

reqParams.name: postalCode
reqParams.description: Postal code of the customer's address.

reqParams.name: role
reqParams.description: Purpose of the address (e.g., 'shipping', 'billing').

reqParams.name: emails
reqParams.description: Array of customer email addresses with their respective roles.

reqParams.name: email
reqParams.description: Customer's email address.

reqParams.name: role
reqParams.description: Role or purpose of the email address.

reqParams.name: phoneNumbers
reqParams.description: Array of customer phone numbers with their respective roles.

reqParams.name: phoneNumber
reqParams.description: Customer's phone number details.

reqParams.name: code
reqParams.description: International dialing code for the phone number.

reqParams.name: number
reqParams.description: Phone number without the country code.

reqParams.name: role
reqParams.description: Role or purpose of the phone number (e.g., 'own', 'work', 'home').

reqParams.name: cardIds
reqParams.description: Array of payment card identifiers associated with the customer.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data containing the created customer information.

resParams.name: customerId
resParams.description: Unique identifier assigned to the newly created customer.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch Customer Details by ID
apis.description: Retrieves customer information using the customer ID. Use this API to get detailed customer profile including personal information, addresses, contact details, and associated payment cards for customer management and transaction processing.

resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data containing comprehensive customer information.
